text:
Heading off any on-point questions of ethics — this interview was not, to the best of my knowledge, the result of any payment or special dealing, w.r.t. the fact that Replit is a sponsor of our podcast. I'm not aware of any expectation that they'd get an episode as a result of sponsoring us.

This will probably not be the last time that some org that sponsors our show is featured as the subject of an episode. But if any of this makes you uncomfortable, or if you'd like to offer me any advice on how to do right by all of you in navigating these situations, by all means please DM me.

:cake:

text: personally it seems like if they’re in the space, it’d make sense we’d want to talk to them. I think the only time it’d get weird is if it were completely unrelated.
